value:
Thanks for reaching out! Unfortunately, our system doesn't have a built-in way to identify which specific phone number initiated a group text—you're right that you only see the full list of participants. 

A couple of workarounds: you could try replying directly to the group and asking the person to text you individually, or if you have other context (like knowing roughly when they joined the group or any other details), that might help narrow it down. If you happen to know their name or any other identifier, I'm happy to help troubleshoot further.

Let me know if either of those approaches works for you!
